title: Beille 3pc Stainless Steel Kitchen Cutlery Knife Set Cutting Santoku Chef Knife
description:
The Beille 3pc kitchen knife set comes with 3 of the most common and essential knife types for any kitchen - a cutting knife, a Santoku knife, and a Chef’s knife. The handles of our knives were designed with comfort and safety in mind. Ergonomic handles ensure the minimization of finger cramps and aches, especially during prolonged usage, and prevent slippage to keep your fingers safe while slicing and cutting. Although the knives are dishwasher safe, we do recommend hand washing to preserve the blades. They are rust and corrosion resistant so you can count on this set of knives for years to come! Constructed of high-quality stainless steel that won’t rust, this kitchen knife set features a comprehensive collection of knives that will quickly meet all your food prep needs

Beille 3pc Stainless Steel Kitchen Cutlery Knife Set Cutting Santoku Chef Knife

The Beille 3pc kitchen knife set comes with 3 of the most common and essential knife types for any kitchen - a cutting knife, a Santoku knife, and a Chef’s knife. The handles of our knives were designed with comfort and safety in mind. Ergonomic handles ensure the minimization of finger cramps and aches, especially during prolonged usage, and prevent slippage to keep your fingers safe while slicing and cutting.

Although the knives are dishwasher safe, we do recommend hand washing to preserve the blades. They are rust and corrosion resistant so you can count on this set of knives for years to come!

Key Features

  • 3PC ESSENTIAL KITCHEN KNIFE SET - The Beille 3pc kitchen knife set comes with 3 of the most common and essential knife types for any kitchen - a cutting knife, a Santoku knife, and a Chef’s knife.
  • ERGONOMIC HANDLES - The handles of our knives were designed with comfort and safety in mind. Ergonomic handles ensure the minimization of finger cramps and aches, especially during prolonged usage, and prevent slippage to keep your fingers safe while slicing and cutting.
  • EASY TO CLEAN - Although the knives are dishwasher safe, we do recommend hand washing to preserve the blades. They are rust and corrosion resistant so you can count on this set of knives for years to come!
  • QUALITY CONSTRUCTION - Constructed of high-quality stainless steel that won’t rust, this kitchen knife set features a comprehensive collection of knives that will quickly meet all your food prep needs. The molded plastic handles and steel blades will stand the test of time!
  • SPECIFICATIONS – Material: Stainless steel (rust and corrosion resistant); 3 different types of knives (cutting, santoku, and chef); Handle color: black; Dishwasher safe
